M0840_ECR_HYPOGLYC (M0840) Hypo/Hyperglycemia, Diabetes Out of Control Emergent Care Reason: hypo/ hyperglycemia, diabetes out of control. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, Space = Unknown. CHAR 1 x x
